bugs.summary: Add initial infrastructure for list-valued property reification in Typed OM
Remove some includes from nsINode.h / Element.h
Move prim_origin from interning keys to prim instances
when switching to a new tab ( not the New Tab ) but a new tab, sidebar and new converstation not initiated
Restrict static-analysis scope to a subset of options
[clang-tidy] Make out codebase modernize-use-equals-default and modernize-use-equals-delete proof
[clang-tidy] Make out codebase readability-redundant-string-cstr and readability-redundant-string-init proof
Make the clang-tidy task blocking for CI
Use dots instead of em dashes in urlbar view rows for Nova
Can not close Firefox after restore, without naming the selectable profile.
Replace voluptuous for schema validation in taskgraph.
Generate dependency verification metadata for gradle deps
Implement support for policy to force restart when update is ready to install
